title: Zhipu surges 33% as Wall Street raises bets on China AI after Anthropic curbs
summary_full: Shares of Chinese AI model developer Zhipu surged as Wall Street banks raised bets on the company's ability to capture global AI demand.
summary_public: Shares of Chinese AI model developer Zhipu surged as Wall Street banks raised bets on the company's ability to capture global AI demand.
